3279730.name: Once We're Home
3279730.description: Play the story of rescue dog Marduk, the zoomies-powered husky as he runs, jumps, dashes, flings and dodges his way home.   But wait, he doesn't have a home... just yet.  Set in the Canadian prairies from one owner to the next, he can't quite seem to stay long enough.  Always ends up without a home after long.   Not until he finishes his harrowing journey about family found & family lost and then family found again with a new family.   Platform, explore & role-play along the way.  Talk to other dogs and their "Long Paw" owners.   Help some other dogs out OR see that you're the best & the fastest dog around!  Just watch out for the Canadian Geese!
3279730.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
